nasb.text: Then he died in a ripe old age, full of days, riches and honor; and his son Solomon reigned in his place.

esv.text: Then he died at a good age, full of days, riches, and honor. And Solomon his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 大衛年紀老邁，壽數滿足，享盡富足和尊榮才去世；他的兒子所羅門接續他作王。

ccb.text: 大卫年纪老迈，享尽富贵尊荣后，寿终正寝。他儿子所罗门继位。
